===================
Bob Dylan
Deer Creek Music Center
Noblesville, Indiana
8 July 1989

no info about lineage and taper

Disk 1
01 Most Likely You Go Your Way (And I'll Go Mine) 
02 Masters Of War 
03 I Believe In You 
04 Shot Of Love 
05 You're A Big Girl Now 
06 Shelter From The Storm 
07 It's Alright, Ma (I'm Only Bleeding) (acoustic) 
08 Wagoner's Lad (acoustic) 

Disk 2
09 Don't Think Twice, It's All Right (acoustic) 
10 Knockin' On Heaven's Door (acoustic- >electric) 
11 Silvio 
12 In The Garden 
13 Like A Rolling Stone 
14 Mr. Tambourine Man (acoustic)
